title: Sour Vietnamese Cheese Bhuna
description: This low-calorie-friendly sour and tender Vietnamese dish features a blend of liquid cheese with a spicy bhuna sauce, perfect for a quick snack or meal.

ingredients.name: liquid cheese (e.g. paneer or cottage cheese), shredded

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add cashews and stir for about 2 minutes until they start to brown slightly.
Pour in soy sauce and lime juice; bring to a simmer and cook for another minute, stirring occasionally.
Gently fold in shredded liquid cheese. It may take some time as it cools down the heat.
Stir in scallions and cilantro; serve immediately.
